This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Changing the allow attribute is a no-op for the current navigation
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'allowsFeature')"
[FAIL] Changing the allow attribute is a no-op for frame-initiated navigations
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'allowsFeature')"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
